summary: Execute Rwanda Revenue Authority follow-up now to secure a 30-minute discovery/demo; if no connect, email within 10 minutes; fully log in CRM and post status within 60 minutes.
reasoning: Within Kigali business hours, zero active deals, four overdue tasks, and idle sales capacity. Prior identical directives remain unexecuted; acting now is the fastest path to creating pipeline before close of business.

task.title: RRA follow-up: call now (Kigali/CAT) to book 30-minute discovery/demo; email if no connect; log in CRM
task.description: Start immediately and confirm start in CRM within 2 minutes. 1) CRM prep (<=10 min): Create company “Rwanda Revenue Authority” and a new deal “RRA — Discovery” (stage: Discovery/Qualification); link the existing contact; attach prior notes. 2) Call now (until 17:30 CAT): Dial the primary contact immediately. If no answer, leave voicemail (if available) and within 10 minutes attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard. 3) On live connect: Confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and procurement/compliance steps; handle objections; secure a 30-minute discovery/demo this week and send the calendar invite before ending the call. 4) If no connect: Within 10 minutes send a concise follow-up email proposing three 30-minute Kigali-time slots over the next 3 business days (e.g., Mon 10:00, Tue 14:00, Wed 16:00 CAT); include agenda, a one-pager, and a relevant case study; cc known stakeholders. 5) CRM logging: Record all call attempts/voicemail/email with outcomes. If booked, update stage to Discovery Scheduled and attach the invite. If not booked, schedule the next follow-up within 48 hours with blockers noted. 6) Data gaps: If numbers are invalid or email bounces, list exact gaps (contact name, direct line, switchboard, alt emails) and hand off to research for enrichment. 7) Status: Post a brief summary of attempts, outcomes, and next steps within 60 minutes. Voicemail (30s): “Hello [Name], this is [Your Name] from Luuku AI. Following up on how we can help RRA streamline [brief value]. I’d like to schedule a 30-minute discovery/demo this week. I’ll email three Kigali-time options. You can also reach me at [number]. Thank you.” Email subject: “Luuku AI x RRA — 30‑min discovery/demo (this week)”. Email body: “Hi [Name], great to connect recently. We can help RRA [1–2 outcomes]. Proposed 30‑min slots (Kigali/CAT): [Slot 1], [Slot 2], [Slot 3]. Agenda: 1) RRA priorities, 2) Luuku AI overview and demo, 3) Fit, timeline, compliance. Attaching a one-pager and a relevant case study. Please confirm a slot or suggest alternatives. Best, [Your Name] [Title] [Contact].” If not started within 5 minutes or blocked, ping Executive immediately.
